title: 新加坡明年測試公共交通接受 Apple Pay 付款

replies.msg:
新加坡交通部門日前宣佈，計劃在 2018 年推出一項 Apple Pay 有關的測試項目，乘客可以 iPhone 或 Apple Watch 購買車票或支付車資。今次測試是當地交通機構和 MasterCard 合作的成果，是 ABT 帳戶式支付系統的附屬項目。



帳戶式支付系統最快明年 3 月於新加坡推行，透過使用非接觸式付款方式，以信用卡或儲值卡簡化公共交通購票的流程。新加坡交通部門表示，現時已經有超過 10 萬名市民申請參加測試計劃，預計每日將會有超過 6 萬宗相關交易。原本 ABT 帳戶式支付系統只會測試 6 個月，但因為引入 Apple Pay 支付方案，測試期間將會延長。

除了 Apple Pay，新加坡交通部門亦會同時測試 Android Pay 和 Samsung Pay 兩大手機支付平台，預計測試會在明年首季同步展開。

LTA

LTA said that the scheme would also be extended to Visa and NETS cards from June next year.
Originally launched in March 2017, the ABT pilot will be extended beyond its initial six-month period, LTA said. It added that more than 100,000 commuters have signed up for the pilot since it launched.
Under the initial scheme, commuters can pay for public transport rides with contactless credit or debit Mastercard cards and track their transactions online or via a mobile app. Commuters are charged for rides in their credit or debit card bill.
Commuters who do not have credit or debit cards will still be able to use their existing CEPAS travel cards (such as current EZ-Link, NETS FlashPay or LTA concession cards) for their public transport rides.

Read more at http://www.channelnewsasia.com/news/singapore/lta-to-trial-apple-pay-android-pay-on-public-transport-9205028


重點唔係mobile payment，人地本身係想support contactless credit/debit card，延伸落去因為apple pay/android pay等等都係用緊同一技術所以直接做埋。亦都唔會出現電話無電搭唔到車嘅情況，因為主要都係講緊要支援實體卡。
簡單講佢哋本來只係可以用八達通，依家就係試緊可以用埋paywave同paypass。而由於apple pay/android pay都係用緊paywave/paypass套system，所以就順便support埋mobile payment。而唔係為推mobile payment而整
呢d就真係推動科技得嚟但又唔會盲推喇

Originally launched in March 2017, the ABT pilot will be extended beyond its initial six-month period, LTA said. It added that more than 100,000 commuters have signed up for the pilot since it launched.
Under the initial scheme, commuters can pay for public transport rides with contactless credit or debit Mastercard cards and track their transactions online or via a mobile app. Commuters are charged for rides in their credit or debit card bill.
Commuters who do not have credit or debit cards will still be able to use their existing CEPAS travel cards (such as current EZ-Link, NETS FlashPay or LTA concession cards) for their public transport rides.

Read more at http://www.channelnewsasia.com/news/singapore/lta-to-trial-apple-pay-android-pay-on-public-transport-9205028


重點唔係mobile payment，人地本身係想support contactless credit/debit card，延伸落去因為apple pay/android pay等等都係用緊同一技術所以直接做埋。亦都唔會出現電話無電搭唔到車嘅情況，因為主要都係講緊要支援實體卡。
簡單講佢哋本來只係可以用八達通，依家就係試緊可以用埋paywave同paypass。而由於apple pay/android pay都係用緊paywave/paypass套system，所以就順便support埋mobile payment。而唔係為推mobile payment而整
呢d就真係推動科技得嚟但又唔會盲推喇

而如果政府做大股東嘅港鐵唔幫手推, 其他交通工具都好難會跟


所以香港八達通豪無壓力，用一模式用多 20年 你都吹佢唔脹


行之有效又穩定 唔明點解要變
